validated_reasoning: The dominant research question type is Descriptive as the essay provides an overview of research development in information technology and tourism over the last twenty years, summarizing characteristics and trends without formal hypothesis testing or prediction [1], [2]. The focus is on understanding and improving utilities for consumer communication and engagement, which aligns with descriptive analysis [5].

validated_bibliography.section: A B S T R A C T
validated_bibliography.direct_quote: This essay presents an overview of the research development over the last twenty years on information technology and tourism.

validated_bibliography.section: A B S T R A C T
validated_bibliography.direct_quote: Knowledge development within each of these eras is examined in terms of the technological conditions, dominant paradigms, main research questions, and influential discipline and research approaches.

The main purpose of research was then to understand and improve its utilities for consumer communication and engagement and, thus, it was driven by the needs of tourism marketing and business opportunities.
